samples.transcript: The room is not really hot or cold, I just want that soft background fan sound to fall asleep, so, like, can you put the thermostat into Fan_Only mode
This song always reminds me of college, good times. Man, I feel old. Um, it's a little hot on my side, can you set the driver's temp to sixteen degrees?
My eyes are kinda tired from staring at spreadsheets all day and, uh, this harsh light is not helping, could you, you know, ramp the brightness down to 40 over two minutes
